creator: kristinacors
caption: 3 Things You’ll Love About This Hotel in Sydney, Australia. Thank you so much for hosting me! #travelbucketlist #sydneyaustralia #boutiquehotel #wheretostayinsydneyaustralia #besthotels @woolstore1888sydney

transcription.text: Three things you'll love about this boutique hotel in Sydney. First, the room. The bed is huge, insanely comfortable, and the bathroom feels more spa than hotel. I mean, look at this tub. I also loved how thoughtfully the space was laid out. This desk was perfect for getting work done, and the room was so spacious, it honestly felt like I had my own apartment in Sydney. Second, the location. You're right near the city center and super close to the TikTok headquarters, which makes this perfect if you're here for work or play. Everything is walkable, convenient, and very Sydney. Third, breakfast. I'm not joking when I say I'm still thinking about the chicken and waffles. They were crispy, savory, basically the ideal way to start your day before exploring. And of course, the bonus points for the service, from the welcome sign and handwritten note, to offering an umbrella when it started downpouring. It's the little thoughtful touches that really made this place stand out. The name of this hotel is Hotel Wilster 1888. So save this video if you're looking for a boutique stay that feels cozy, elevated, and thoughtfully designed. And share this with your travel buddy if Sydney's on their bucket list.
